Name: Retold Facto
Tagline: Data warehouse and knowledge graph storage for the Retold ecosystem.

		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24

		V 72
		Q 94 94 72 94
		H 24
		Q 2 94 2 72
		V 24
		Q 2 2 24 2 Z" fill="#2e8ab5"/>

		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"

			font-size="38" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">RF</text>
	</svg>
